title: Heroes of the Street
writer: Mildred Considine, Edmund Goulding, Isabel Johnston
actors: Wesley Barry, Marie Prevost, Jack Mulhall
plot: When a smart-aleck street kid's police officer father is killed in the line of duty, the boy turns over a new leaf and goes to work to support his mother, brothers, and sisters. He gets a job as an usher in a theater, but really w...
